name: tokenslim
description: Input-token compressor for Claude Code. Bundles PostToolUse hooks for Bash, Read, Edit|Write, mcp__.*, and Grep|Glob plus a PreToolUse Read guard. Compresses tool results before they enter model context, keeps the Read dedup cache warm across Edit/Write, and warns before large unbounded reads. Deterministic, cache-safe heuristics. Zero dependencies.
